full_description: there are three blocks colored red, green and blue on the table. their positions are randomized. move them to the center and stack them in the specified order
schema: {A} notifies the bottom block, {B} notifies the middle block, {C} notifies the top block, {a} notifies the arm to manipulate {A}, {b} notifies the arm to manipulate {B}, {c} notifies the arm to manipulate {C}
preference: num of words should not exceed 20. Degree of detail avg 8
seen: Move {A}, {B}, {C} to the center, then stack {B} on {A} and {C} on {B}.
Center all blocks and build a stack: {B} on {A}, then {C} on {B}.
Bring {A}, {B}, {C} to the middle and stack them with {C} on top.
Use {a}, {b}, {c} to move {A}, {B}, {C} to the center, then stack {B} over {A} and {C} over {B}.
Transfer {A}, {B}, and {C} to the center and stack them: {B} onto {A}, {C} onto {B}.
Relocate {A}, {B}, {C} centrally and stack {C} on {B} and {B} on {A}.
unseen: Move {A}, {B}, and {C} to the center, then stack {B} on {A} and {C} on {B}.
Bring {A}, {B}, {C} to the center and stack them with {C} on top.
Use {a}, {b}, {c} to move {A}, {B}, {C} to the middle and stack them.
